name: tokenizer_isolation

arms.label: scratch_ce
arms.description: No anchor; plain C4 CE from random Qwen3-0.6B init.

arms.label: full_anchor
arms.description: lambda=0.01 Frobenius anchor on all matchable Qwen3 donor weights.

arms.label: embed_lm_head_only_anchor
arms.description: Anchor only model.embed_tokens.weight and lm_head.weight, with lambda normalized per seed to match full-anchor initial gradient L2.

arms.label: no_embed_lm_head_anchor
arms.description: Anchor all matchable Qwen3 donor weights except embed_tokens and lm_head, with lambda normalized per seed to match full-anchor initial gradient L2.

lambda_normalization.purpose: equalize initial anchor-gradient L2 across anchored arms per recipient seed

pass_criteria.PASS: no_embed_lm_head gain >= +0.5 nats vs scratch; no_embed_lm_head beats embed_lm_head_only by >= +0.3 nats; 3/3 seeds positive; paired CI for no_embed_lm_head minus embed_lm_head_only excludes zero
pass_criteria.FAIL_TOKENIZER: embed_lm_head_only gain >= +0.5 nats and no_embed_lm_head gain < +0.3 nats

data.protocol_source: g165 Qwen3 C4 train-stream protocol with explicit 8192/256 window counts

42.description: No anchor; plain C4 CE from random Qwen3-0.6B init.

7.description: No anchor; plain C4 CE from random Qwen3-0.6B init.

13.description: No anchor; plain C4 CE from random Qwen3-0.6B init.

7.description: Anchor only model.embed_tokens.weight and lm_head.weight, with lambda normalized per seed to match full-anchor initial gradient L2.

13.description: Anchor only model.embed_tokens.weight and lm_head.weight, with lambda normalized per seed to match full-anchor initial gradient L2.

42.description: Anchor all matchable Qwen3 donor weights except embed_tokens and lm_head, with lambda normalized per seed to match full-anchor initial gradient L2.

7.description: Anchor all matchable Qwen3 donor weights except embed_tokens and lm_head, with lambda normalized per seed to match full-anchor initial gradient L2.

13.description: Anchor all matchable Qwen3 donor weights except embed_tokens and lm_head, with lambda normalized per seed to match full-anchor initial gradient L2.

summary.verdict: INTERMEDIATE: tokenizer-isolation criteria did not cleanly pass or fail. embed gain=+0.483 nats; no_embed gain=-0.439 nats; no_embed-minus-embed=-0.923 nats with 95% CI [-1.055, -0.835].

build_summary.design: Four-arm tokenizer isolation of g165 full-anchor effect: scratch CE, full donor anchor, embed/lm-head-only donor anchor, and all-except-embed/lm-head donor anchor.

pass_criteria_text.PASS: no_embed_lm_head gain >= +0.5 nats vs scratch; no_embed_lm_head beats embed_lm_head_only by >= +0.3 nats; 3/3 seeds positive; paired CI for no_embed_lm_head minus embed_lm_head_only excludes zero
pass_criteria_text.FAIL_TOKENIZER: embed_lm_head_only gain >= +0.5 nats and no_embed_lm_head gain < +0.3 nats

codex_sev7_verdict_gate.interpretation: Effect is not cleanly localized; requires follow-up before strong transfer framing.
